title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!
